task_statement: P5d follow-up: consolidate checker fixture declarations after P5c mandatory declared_gate_refs so check_profile.py --all can reach the intended adapter capability assertions.
selection_rule: manual narrow graph because P5c closed production seams but exposed an adjacent checker fixture admission-order gap outside P5c write scope.

nodes.work_statement:
Fix the P5c check_profile.py --all fallout only. Current failure: agent_axis_behavioral adapter_capability_rehome_case fixture expects silent write-scope rejection but its helper _adapter_capability_plan builds a Link row without declared_gate_refs, so mandatory P5 validation rejects earlier with 'Building plan Link row must declare declared_gate_refs'. Update support/checkers/lib/adapter_capability_checks.py fixtures so the adapter capability tests explicitly declare link-gate:default-transition on their Link rows before exercising adapter/write-scope behavior. Do not weaken P5 plan_validation. Do not edit support/operator or support/connection. Run py_compile changed file, agent_axis_behavioral profile, bounded_agent_proposed_routing_loop profile if useful, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all. Return exact changed files/commands/not_proven.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P5 follow-up fixture consolidation only. Do not broaden beyond the check_profile.py --all gap caused by mandatory declared_gate_refs. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

QA the P5d fixture consolidation. Verify the diff only updates checker fixture declarations, not production Link/operator behavior. Confirm adapter_capability_rehome_case no longer fails first on missing declared_gate_refs and check_profile.py --all is green. If any implementation/evidence gap remains, return non-binding concern targeting work.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P5 follow-up fixture consolidation only. Do not broaden beyond the check_profile.py --all gap caused by mandatory declared_gate_refs. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.

Close P5d. Report observed_evidence / narrowly_proven / not_proven / remaining_delta / parent_goal_delta_status. Done condition: check_profile.py --all green after P5c+P5d, changed files match declared fixture scope, and P5c production behavior remains in place. If gap remains, return Link-facing concern targeting work.

Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Keep Movement vocabulary forward/reroute; HOLD/pause is lifecycle. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.
